uncovered_waiver.reason: The flip is a pure additive wrapper: handle(request) unpacks the composite ModelComplianceReportReduceRequest(state, check_result) and delegates to reduce_compliance() (unmodified, independently covered by 7 pre-existing unit tests), then wraps the (new_state, intents) tuple in ModelComplianceReportReduceResponse. This pool exercises both the not-replaced (new node_id, append) and replaced (same node_id, both passed_delta directions) branches of reduce_compliance, plus run-identity preservation through a replace cycle; intents is always [] in this handler's current implementation so the emit-intents branch has no alternate path to exercise.
